parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Synology Chat destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise synologys:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native Synology Chat payload directly to your Synology NAS, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: payload={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your own Synology Chat server (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Synology Chat destinations, direct

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Synology Chat host

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Synology Chat token
